new_classes.label_en: Protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) wine quality
new_classes.label_de: Qualität eines Weins mit geschützter Ursprungsbezeichnung (g.U.)
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a wine that has been awarded a protected designation of origin (PDO / g.U.) in accordance with EU wine legislation and Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22 of the CN.

new_classes.label_en: Other PDO wine, in containers holding ≤ 2 l — other (CN 2204 21 68)
new_classes.label_de: Anderer Wein mit g.U. in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von 2 l oder weniger – anderer (KN 2204 21 68)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes bearing a protected designation of origin (PDO/g.U.) as defined in Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22, other than Tokaj, presented in containers of a nominal volume not exceeding 2 litres, and not classified under any more specific subheading (not semi-sparkling, not Tokaj, not Champagne, not Prosecco). CN code 2204 21 68.

coverage_explanation: The axioms capture the three main distinguishing criteria for CN 2204 21 68: (1) wine of fresh grapes (FreshGrapeOriginQuality), (2) bearing a protected designation of origin – PDO/g.U. as per Additional Note 6(a) to Chapter 22 (new PDOWineQuality), and (3) presented in containers ≤ 2 l (SmallContainer). Negative conditions exclude sparkling wine (≥ 3 bar, heading 2204 10), semi-sparkling wine (1–3 bar, sibling 2204 21 09), and Tokaj (sibling 2204 21 23). Coverage is not 1.0 because: (a) the full scope of Additional Note 6(a) (the exhaustive list of PDO wine designations) cannot be expressed without enumerating every individual PDO — that enumeration is outside the scope of a single axiom set; (b) the "other" residual nature of 2204 21 68 relative to other PDO subheadings (e.g. Champagne 2204 10 11, Prosecco 2204 10 15) is partially captured via the sparkling-wine complement but the TBox does not yet contain sibling PDO subheadings at the 2204 21 level that might need to be excluded (e.g. 2204 21 11–2204 21 64 for specific named PDOs); those are modelled in parallel and will provide disjointness once added.
